channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Fight for House raging in districts ringing NYC where Trump struggled but other Republicans thrived
item.description: NELSONVILLE, N.Y. (AP) — Voters in a ring of congressional districts encircling New York City where Republican candidates often do well but Donald Trump struggled in 2020 could decide which party controls the U.S. House for the next two years.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Doctor deems Harris in 'excellent health.' Her team aims to contrast with Trump's scant medical info
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris says Republican Donald Trump isn't releasing information about his health because he doesn't want the public to see if he's fit to be president.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Data shows migrants aren’t taking jobs from Black or Hispanic people, despite what Trump says
item.description: Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump promises the biggest deportation event the U.S. has ever seen if he is elected.
item.dc:creator: Fatima Hussein, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump's campaign requests military aircraft and armored vehicles in response to threats from Iran
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Donald Trump 's aides have requested a slew of stepped-up security measures, including military aircraft capable of shooting down surface-to-air missiles to transport the former president in the race’s final stretch, amid growing concerns over threats from Iran in a campaign already
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Are male voters reluctant to vote for a woman? Harris' backers are confronting the question head on
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The concern has been there all along, but now it's being talked about openly: Are some men reluctant to vote for Democrat Kamala Harris because she’s a woman? The vice president rarely references her gender on the campaign trail, but her key supporters are starting to make more dir
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Comer slams Raskin as 'ultimate hypocrite' after Raskin stopped short of committing to certify a Trump win
item.description: House Oversight Chair James Comer slammed Rep. Jamie Raskin as "the ultimate hypocrite" and talking "a big game" after Raskin fell short of committing to certifying a Trump win.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: U.S. expands sanctions on Iran in response to its ballistic attack on Israel
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The U.S. on Friday announced new sanctions on Iran's energy sector in response to its Oct. 1 attack on Israel when it fired roughly 180 missiles into the country.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US sees a window for a new push to break political deadlock in Lebanon to ease conflict
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — With Israel’s sabotage and military operations in Lebanon taking out many of Hezbollah’s senior leaders, some in Washington and elsewhere believe there may be a window for a new push to break the political deadlock in Lebanon to try to ease escalating war.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Battle to shore up bases remains as Election Day nears
item.description: MPR News politics editor Brian Bakst and his guest talks about deadly conflicts in the Middle East and how those have factored into domestic politics. Plus, we follow up with two Generation Z voters about how they’re approaching the election.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst, Matthew Alvarez, and Ellie Roth, MPR News

item.title: Harris viewed more positively by Hispanic women than by Hispanic men: AP-NORC poll
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A solid majority of Hispanic women have a positive opinion of Vice President Kamala Harris and a negative view of former President Donald Trump, but Hispanic men are more divided on both candidates, according to a recent poll from The Associated Press-NORC Center for Public Affairs
item.dc:creator: FERNANDA FIGUEROA and LINLEY SANDERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 3 in 5 millennials want full access to abortion: Study
item.description: The largest percentile of individuals who do not want to live in a "fully legal" abortion state is Gen Z at 33%, followed by Gen X and Baby Boomers (30%).
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Biden suggests Trump 'get a life' after false hurricane claims
item.description: Biden specially called out a claim that those impacted by the storm are only receiving $750 in government assistance.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Harris, Trump in virtual dead heat in major swing states
item.description: Vice President Harris and former President Trump are nearly tied in the major swing states that will play a deciding role in the election, according to polling released Thursday by The Hill and Emerson College Polling.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, NewsNation

item.title: Pat Ryan 'incredibly frustrated' over lack of FEMA relief in Orange County
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The race for New York’s 18th Congressional District heated up on Wednesday evening as candidates Alison Esposito and Pat Ryan faced off in a live debate on PIX11 News.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, PIX 11

item.title: Cameron CH Miller discusses his vision for Las Vegas City Council Ward 5
item.description: Cameron CH Miller, a Democratic state assemblyman and candidate for Las Vegas City Council, shared his plans and priorities for Ward 5 on 8 News Now’s Daily Voting Guide.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ryan Hamilton discusses homelessness, the Animal Foundation, and F1
item.description: Ryan Hamilton, a Republican candidate for the Clark County Commission, appeared on 8 News Now's Daily Voting Guide to share his perspective on homelessness, animal welfare, and Formula One's impact on the local economy as the election nears.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Biden postpones trip to Germany and Angola to monitor Hurricane Milton
item.description: President Joe Biden said Tuesday he is postponing a planned trip to Germany and Angola to stay at the White House to monitor Hurricane Milton, as it spins closer to Florida’s Gulf Coast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Election drop boxes open in San Diego County
item.description: While mail ballots are expected to arrive this week for registered voters, 150 official ballot drop boxes opened Tuesday in San Diego County for the November Presidential General Election.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: U.S. Treasury says tribally owned entities should be tax-exempt
item.description: Proposed new guidelines would clarify the decades-old question of whether tribal businesses or entities are exempt from federal taxes.
item.dc:creator: MPR News

item.title: Hurricane Milton may be October surprise in presidential battle
item.description: Strategists in both parties are looking back to Hurricane Sandy, which slammed into the mid-Atlantic states shortly before Election Day 2012.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Michael Naft discusses traffic safety, F1, and animal welfare in the Las Vegas valley
item.description: Michael Naft, incumbent county commissioner for District 8, joined Brian Loftis on the 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide Monday, discussing his campaign priorities as election day nears.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fact checking falsehoods about FEMA funding and Hurricane Helene
item.description: Rumors, misinformation and lies about the federal government’s response to Hurricane Helene have run rampant since the storm made landfall, especially around FEMA funding.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler, MPR News

item.title: Minnesota Republicans seek a reset after two years of DFL trifecta in St. Paul
item.description: All 134 Minnesota House seats are on the ballot this fall, along with one state Senate seat. The results could flip political control of the Legislature.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: This year’s Electoral College map may show another ‘blue shift.’ Here’s why
item.description: Differences in how quickly each state’s counties can report this year’s election results may lead to another “blue shift” or “red mirage” on the presidential electoral map.
item.dc:creator: Hansi Lo Wang, MPR News

item.title: Trump urges his supporters to deliver victory in his return to scene of first assassination attempt
item.description: BUTLER, Pa. (AP) — Donald Trump returned on Saturday to the Pennsylvania fairgrounds where he was nearly assassinated in July, urging a large crowd to deliver an Election Day victory that he tied to his survival of the shooting.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, JILL COLVIN and ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, Fox 5
